response.overview: Enter the abandoned workshop of Murray's Costume Manor, fallen deep underneath the once Famed Fredbear's Family Diner, now covered in moss and ruin. Teenager Liam discovers the Diner nestled deep within the depths of Gower Hey Wood. Upon entering he begins unravelling the mystery left behind by the reclusive Inventor, Edwin Murray, only to unleash an evil humanity cannot contain...
response.tagline: Be careful what you awaken in the dark...
response.title: Mimic From The Past

results.name: Five Nights at Freddy's: Mimic From The Past - Official Trailer
